jobs.name: ernest-daily-brief
jobs.prompt: Read the live inbox, calendar, and HubSpot pipeline via the connected tools. Write a short morning brief to the Obsidian vault under Ernest/00-Daily/. Surface only items needing the CEO today. Draft-only. If nothing needs attention, reply [SILENT].

jobs.name: ernest-dropped-ball-scan
jobs.prompt: Scan open Outlook threads and HubSpot deals for stalled follow-ups and unmet promises. Produce prioritized ownership cards. Draft replies but do not send. If nothing is stalled, reply [SILENT].

jobs.name: ernest-self-improve
jobs.prompt: Review this week's sessions and corrections. Use the Hermes Dojo to rank weak skills, then propose at most one improvement (install a vetted skill, author one with skill-creator, or patch via self-evolution). Output a reviewable proposal with a rollback. Adopt nothing without CEO approval.
